name: topic_connections
description:
Discover connections between topics in your content.

With synthesize=true (recommended), uses AI to explain the significance of connections.

Returns:
- Topic co-occurrence graph
- Strongest topic relationships
- Central/hub topics
- Path finding between topics
- AI insights about connections (when enabled)

Use this to understand how your interests connect.

topics.description: Specific topics to analyze (optional, auto-detect if not specified)

find_path.description: Find connection path between two topics

synthesize.description: Use AI to explain connection significance (default: true if LLM configured)

compact.description: Return compact result with file reference (default: true for ~80% token reduction)
